mutations.change: Remove one required Autonomous credential variable from the preflight environment while leaving all other inputs present.
mutations.reason: The cloud gate must report NOT RUN and fail before commands execute when any required external authority is absent.

mutations.change: Replace the attested Autonomous service with an otherwise healthy local Oracle Free database observation.
mutations.reason: Local feature compatibility cannot prove deployment to the charter-required real Autonomous Database target.

mutations.change: Mark managed ORDS false while preserving successful-looking HTTP request hashes and API results.
mutations.reason: A local ORDS container or proxy cannot satisfy the required managed ORDS transport and provenance boundary.

mutations.change: Report an Autonomous database major version below the reviewed minimum while all feature rows claim success.
mutations.reason: The plan explicitly requires Autonomous Database 23ai or later independent of apparent feature results.

mutations.change: Set the unchanged entrance marker false to represent a cloud-specific copy of the reviewed capability probe.
mutations.reason: P11 begins only after the unchanged P0 probes run; a tailored cloud copy could silently remove unsupported cases.

mutations.change: Delete MATCH_RECOGNIZE from the live capability observations but retain overall entrance success.
mutations.reason: Every required feature must execute a result-bearing example, so a partial feature inventory fails closed.

mutations.change: Change one required capability observation from PASS to SKIP without changing its evidence hash.
mutations.reason: Unsupported or skipped Oracle functionality blocks P11 and cannot be converted into informational success.

mutations.change: Remove the maximum expected frame payload case from otherwise complete managed ORDS transport evidence.
mutations.reason: The exact P0 transport suite includes its maximum payload memory and truncation guard on the cloud target.

mutations.change: Change the gzip JSON transport observation to FAIL while retaining an overall PASS result field.
mutations.reason: A transport representation mismatch blocks P11 with no fallback regardless of other API functionality.

mutations.change: Replace the locked SQLcl build with an adjacent unreviewed version in the deployment evidence.
mutations.reason: Only the exact tool version pinned in versions.lock may apply the production scripts to the target.

mutations.change: Swap seed and engine application order while keeping every domain and script digest represented.
mutations.reason: The cloud deployment must reproduce the canonical local ordering rather than only the same set of files.

mutations.change: Mark the deployment tool as installed from the network during verification despite a matching version string.
mutations.reason: Verification uses pinned cached tooling and cannot trust mutable network installation at execution time.

mutations.change: Remove the live resource observation marker while retaining plausible CPU and storage numbers.
mutations.reason: Declared or copied configuration does not validate the target service's actual resource allocation and policy.

mutations.change: Report one forbidden system privilege assigned to the application schema with other grant counts unchanged.
mutations.reason: Administrative ANY-object or DBA-class authority violates least privilege even if all API tests pass.

mutations.change: Add a directly REST-enabled game session table beside the two reviewed package exposures.
mutations.reason: Dynamic data must be exposed only through the exact reviewed AutoREST package/object surface.

mutations.change: Report one custom ORDS handler while the expected AutoREST object list remains exact.
mutations.reason: Custom modules, templates and handlers are forbidden alternate API surfaces under the charter.

mutations.change: Increase the live invalid production object count after deployment from zero to one.
mutations.reason: Any compilation failure or invalid object makes the cloud database deployment incomplete.

mutations.change: Leave one disposable P0 probe object present in the target schema after entrance cleanup.
mutations.reason: The reviewed capability probe must clean up and cannot alter the production catalog fingerprint.

mutations.change: Increment the cloud linedef row count while preserving its local count and both hash strings.
mutations.reason: Cloud seed counts and canonical hashes must independently equal a freshly measured local baseline.

mutations.change: Replace the cloud engine state hash with another valid lowercase SHA-256 value at the same count.
mutations.reason: Equal counts cannot detect content or ordering drift, so each canonical domain hash must also match.

mutations.change: Delete the replay direct API case while leaving new-game, step and save/load evidence present.
mutations.reason: Acceptance requires all reviewed direct API tests, not a representative subset of successful calls.

mutations.change: Bind one API observation to a different valid origin hash than the attested managed ORDS origin.
mutations.reason: Every direct request must traverse the one actual target managed ORDS surface without proxy substitution.

mutations.change: Embed a connection-string field name in retained evidence without including its actual secret value.
mutations.reason: Even secret-bearing field names and endpoints are forbidden from canonical retained evidence to prevent accidental leakage.

mutations.change: Mark the evidence output as written non-atomically while all content hashes remain syntactically valid.
mutations.reason: Partial or mixed-run evidence must not be accepted if a failing process can leave a success-shaped document.
